throw_rock.name: Throw Rock
throw_rock.description: Throw a rock dealing [{base} + {attack} + {int}] physical damage and stunning for {stunDuration} turn

holy_smite.name: Holy Smite
holy_smite.description: Deal [{base} + {attack} + {int}] magic damage to enemy and heal lowest HP ally for {healPercent} of damage dealt

divine_light.name: Divine Light
divine_light.description: Heal target ally for [{base} + {int}] HP and remove 1 debuff

sanctuary.name: Sanctuary
sanctuary.description: All allies gain Increase Defense and convert debuffs to Increase Attack for {duration} turns

hierophant_male_passive.name: Divine Protection
hierophant_male_passive.description: Allies gain 20% shield when receiving any buff

hierophant_female_passive.name: Blessed Regeneration
hierophant_female_passive.description: Allies with buffs regenerate 5% HP per turn

prophet_male_passive.name: Overflow Shield
prophet_male_passive.description: Overhealing creates shield up to 25% max HP

prophetess_female_passive.name: Divine Immunity
prophetess_female_passive.description: Overhealing applies Immune buff for 1 turn

aimed_shot.name: Aimed Shot
aimed_shot.description: High damage shot dealing [{base} + {attack} + {agi}] physical damage, ignores 25% armor and breaks shields

hunters_mark.name: Hunter's Mark
hunters_mark.description: Apply Mark and Blight debuff to target for {duration} turns

double_shot.name: Double Shot
double_shot.description: Fire twice: first shot applies Reduce Defense, second shot hits random enemy and applies Bleed

rain_of_arrows.name: Rain of Arrows
rain_of_arrows.description: AOE damage dealing [{base} + {attack} + {agi}] + {debuffBonus} per debuff on enemies

sniper_male_passive.name: Executioner
sniper_male_passive.description: Deal 150% damage to enemies below 30% HP

sniper_female_passive.name: Kill Rush
sniper_female_passive.description: Killing an enemy grants Increase Speed buff for 2 turns

monster_hunter_male_passive.name: Bleeding Shot
monster_hunter_male_passive.description: Aimed Shot applies Bleed for 1 turn

monster_hunter_female_passive.name: Exploit Weakness
monster_hunter_female_passive.description: Gain 5% action bar per debuff on Aimed Shot target

natures_blessing.name: Nature's Blessing
natures_blessing.description: Deal [{base} + {attack} + {int}] magic damage to enemy and grant 10% action bar to lowest HP ally

barkskin.name: Barkskin
barkskin.description: Target ally gains Increase Defense, heals 5% HP, and gains 5% max HP shield

primal_roar.name: Primal Roar
primal_roar.description: AOE damage dealing [{base} + {attack} + {str}] physical damage and apply Reduce Attack for {duration} turns

natures_balance.name: Nature's Balance
natures_balance.description: AOE: Remove all debuffs from allies (heal {healAmount}) OR remove all buffs from enemies (deal {damageAmount} damage)

runemaster_male_passive.name: Intimidating Roar
runemaster_male_passive.description: Primal Roar taunts all enemies for 1 turn

runemaster_female_passive.name: Nature's Revenge
runemaster_female_passive.description: When taking magical damage, retaliate with Nature's Blessing without using action bar

summoner_male_passive.name: Draining Blessing
summoner_male_passive.description: Nature's Blessing lowers action bar of lowest HP enemy by 5%

summoner_female_passive.name: Healing Blessing
summoner_female_passive.description: Nature's Blessing heals lowest HP ally for 5% HP

arcane_missiles.name: Arcane Missiles
arcane_missiles.description: Hit target for [{base} + {attack} + {int}] magic damage, plus 1 hit to each debuffed enemy

frost_armor.name: Frost Armor
frost_armor.description: Apply Frost Armor buff for {duration} turns (25% damage reduction, attackers are slowed)

helping_hand.name: Helping Hand
helping_hand.description: Remove all debuffs from target and fill their action bar to 100%

twilights_promise.name: Twilight's Promise
twilights_promise.description: Consume 10% action bar from all allies. Next turn unleash Twilight's End for massive AOE damage

white_wizard_male_passive.name: Empowering Cleanse
white_wizard_male_passive.description: Allies cleansed of debuffs gain Increase Attack buff for 1 turn

white_witch_female_passive.name: Hastening Cleanse
white_witch_female_passive.description: When cleansing debuffs, ally gains Increase Speed buff for 1 turn

arch_sage_male_passive.name: Offensive Adaptation
arch_sage_male_passive.description: When receiving a debuff, also gain Increase Attack buff

arch_sage_female_passive.name: Swift Adaptation
arch_sage_female_passive.description: When receiving a debuff, also gain Increase Speed buff

blade_strike.name: Blade Strike
blade_strike.description: Physical attack dealing [{base} + {attack} + {str}] damage, 150% damage if target is bleeding

shield_bash.name: Shield Bash
shield_bash.description: Taunt target for {tauntDuration} turn and gain {shieldAmount} shield

rally_banner.name: Rally Banner
rally_banner.description: Taunt all enemies, allies gain Increase Attack for {duration} turn and 30% action bar

blood_pact.name: Blood Pact
blood_pact.description: Taunt all enemies, apply 2 bleed stacks to self and all taunted enemies

champion_male_passive.name: Stunning Counter
champion_male_passive.description: When hit by physical or magical attack, 20% chance to stun attacker

champion_female_passive.name: Regenerating Shield
champion_female_passive.description: Start battle with Shield equal to 20% max HP, regenerates every 4 turns

avenger_male_passive.name: Blighting Vengeance
avenger_male_passive.description: When attacked by a taunted unit, that unit receives Blight debuff

avenger_female_passive.name: Reactive Speed
avenger_female_passive.description: Gain 15% action bar when taking damage

psi_strike.name: Psi Strike
psi_strike.description: If enemy ≥30% action bar: [{base} + {attack} + {int}] physical damage and drain 5% action bar. If <30%: pure damage

psychic_mark.name: Psychic Mark
psychic_mark.description: Apply Mark and Reduce Speed debuff to target for {duration} turns

void_strike.name: Void Strike
void_strike.description: Hit enemy with Psi Strike once per debuff on target

psi_shift.name: Psi Shift
psi_shift.description: Steal all action bar from target dealing [{base} + {attack} + {int}] magic damage, set target to 25% action bar

dark_arch_templar_male_passive.name: Spreading Decay
dark_arch_templar_male_passive.description: Killing an enemy with debuffs distributes those debuffs randomly to the enemy team

dark_arch_templar_female_passive.name: Blighting Mark
dark_arch_templar_female_passive.description: Psychic Mark also applies Blight debuff

grand_templar_male_passive.name: Stunning Mastery
grand_templar_male_passive.description: All abilities have a 20% chance to stun

grand_templar_female_passive.name: Complete Drain
grand_templar_female_passive.description: Psi Shift sets target to 0% action bar

cheap_shot.name: Cheap Shot
cheap_shot.description: Transfer 1 random debuff from self to target, deal [{base} + {attack} + {agi}] physical damage

cripple.name: Cripple
cripple.description: Apply Reduce Speed, Reduce Attack, and Bleed for {duration} turns

assassinate.name: Assassinate
assassinate.description: Deal [{base} + {attack} + {agi}] pure damage if enemy is below 30% HP and has a debuff

shadowstep.name: Shadowstep
shadowstep.description: Apply Taunt, Mark, and Bleed to target for {duration} turns

phantom_assassin_male_passive.name: Reset on Kill
phantom_assassin_male_passive.description: If Assassinate kills target, refill action bar to 75%

phantom_assassin_female_passive.name: Lethal Opportunity
phantom_assassin_female_passive.description: Cheap Shot deals pure damage if enemy is below 50% HP

master_stalker_male_passive.name: Evasive Bleeder
master_stalker_male_passive.description: 10% dodge pure, 20% magical, 30% physical. Cheap Shot adds Bleed

master_stalker_female_passive.name: Mystical Evasion
master_stalker_female_passive.description: 10% dodge pure, 20% physical, 30% magical. Cheap Shot adds Bleed

purge_slash.name: Purge Slash
purge_slash.description: Deal [{base} + {attack} + {str}] physical damage and remove 1 buff from enemy

nullblade_cleave.name: Nullblade Cleave
nullblade_cleave.description: AOE damage dealing [{base} + {attack} + {int}] + {buffBonus} per buff on enemies

steal_magic.name: Steal Magic
steal_magic.description: Transfer all buffs from enemy to random allies. Unbuffed enemies receive Reduce Defense for {duration} turns

hex.name: Hex
hex.description: Apply Silence debuff to enemy for {duration} turns

grand_inquisitor_male_passive.name: Purifying Strike
grand_inquisitor_male_passive.description: Purge Slash deals pure damage if there is no buff to remove

grand_inquisitor_female_passive.name: Double Purge
grand_inquisitor_female_passive.description: Purge Slash removes 2 buffs on attack instead of 1

professional_witcher_male_passive.name: Anti-Magic Strike
professional_witcher_male_passive.description: Purge Slash deals pure damage to enemies that are silenced

professional_witcher_female_passive.name: Unavoidable Strike
professional_witcher_female_passive.description: Purge Slash against silenced enemies cannot be evaded

slash.name: Slash
slash.description: Deals {percent} of target's max HP or {cap} damage, whichever is lower

bite.name: Bite
bite.description: Deals {percent} of target's max HP or {floor} damage, whichever is higher

spear_thrust.name: Spear Thrust
spear_thrust.description: Thrust spear dealing [{base} + {attack} + {str}] physical damage with {bleedChance} chance to cause Bleed for {bleedDuration} turns

defensive_formation.name: Defensive Formation
defensive_formation.description: Take a defensive stance, gaining Increase Defense for {duration} turns

crushing_strike.name: Crushing Strike
crushing_strike.description: Heavy hammer strike dealing [{base} + {attack} + {str}] physical damage

armor_break.name: Armor Break
armor_break.description: Break enemy armor dealing [{base} + {attack} + {str}] physical damage and applying Reduce Defense for {debuffDuration} turns

crystal_shard.name: Crystal Shard
crystal_shard.description: Hurl a magical crystal dealing [{base} + {attack} + {int}] magical damage

protective_barrier.name: Protective Barrier
protective_barrier.description: Grant lowest HP ally a +{shieldAmount} HP Shield

staff_whack.name: Staff Whack
staff_whack.description: Basic staff attack dealing [{base} + {attack} + {str}] physical damage

ancestral_taunt.name: Ancestral Taunt
ancestral_taunt.description: Force all enemies to attack this unit for {tauntDuration} turns

chieftains_hammer.name: Chieftain's Hammer
chieftains_hammer.description: Mighty hammer blow dealing [{base} + {attack} + {str}] physical damage with {stunChance} chance to Stun for {stunDuration} turn

war_cry.name: War Cry
war_cry.description: Rally allies with Increase Attack for {allyBuffDuration} turns and gain Increase Speed for {selfSpeedDuration} turn

axe_throw.name: Axe Throw
axe_throw.description: Throw an axe dealing [{base} + {attack} + {agi}] physical damage with {bleedChance} chance to cause Bleed for {bleedDuration} turns

berserker_rage.name: Berserker Rage
berserker_rage.description: Enter a rage, gaining Increase Speed for {duration} turns

dual_axes.name: Dual Axes
dual_axes.description: Strike {hitCount} times with axes dealing [{base} + {attack} + {agi}] physical damage each, {bleedChance} bleed chance per hit for {bleedDuration} turns

rallying_cry.name: Rallying Cry
rallying_cry.description: Rally all allies with Increase Speed for {duration} turns

frost_bolt.name: Frost Bolt
frost_bolt.description: Icy bolt dealing [{base} + {attack} + {int}] magical damage and draining {actionBarDrain} action bar

chilling_touch.name: Chilling Touch
chilling_touch.description: {slowChance} chance to apply Reduce Speed for {slowDuration} turns on basic attacks

pack_fury.name: Pack Fury
pack_fury.description: Gain Increase Attack buff for {buffDuration} turns when taking damage

chilling_howl.name: Chilling Howl
chilling_howl.description: Howl that applies Reduce Attack and Reduce Speed to all enemies for {debuffDuration} turns

frost_breath.name: Frost Breath
frost_breath.description: Breathe frost on all enemies dealing [{str}] magical damage and applying Reduce Speed for {slowDuration} turns

thick_hide.name: Thick Hide
thick_hide.description: Take {damageReduction} less damage from all sources

maul.name: Maul
maul.description: Brutal maul dealing [{base} + {attack} + {str}] physical damage and causing Bleed for {bleedDuration} turns

rampage.name: Rampage
rampage.description: Go on a rampage, causing all enemies to Bleed for {bleedDuration} turns

spectral_wail.name: Spectral Wail
spectral_wail.description: Unleash a haunting wail dealing [{base} + {attack} + {int}] magical damage and applying Reduce Attack for {duration} turns

soul_siphon.name: Soul Siphon
soul_siphon.description: Drain soul energy dealing [{base} + {attack} + {int}] magical damage and healing self for {healPercent} of damage dealt

mucous_shield.name: Mucous Shield
mucous_shield.description: Create a protective mucous layer granting {shieldAmount} shield

toxic_splash.name: Toxic Splash
toxic_splash.description: Splash toxic sludge dealing [{base} + {attack} + {str}] physical damage and applying Blight for {duration} turns

root_slam.name: Root Slam
root_slam.description: Slam roots dealing [{base} + {attack} + {str}] physical damage and applying Reduce Speed for {duration} turns

hardened_bark.name: Hardened Bark
hardened_bark.description: Harden bark gaining Increase Defense for {duration} turns

phase_strike.name: Phase Strike
phase_strike.description: Phase through reality dealing [{base} + {attack} + {agi}] physical damage, 150% damage to marked targets

haunting_mark.name: Haunting Mark
haunting_mark.description: Mark target with spectral energy for {duration} turns

wailing_despair.name: Wailing Despair
wailing_despair.description: Unleash despair on all enemies dealing [{base} + {attack} + {int}] magical damage and applying Silence for {duration} turns

deaths_embrace.name: Death's Embrace
deaths_embrace.description: Embrace of death applies Reduce Defense to all enemies for {duration} turns

life_drain.name: Life Drain
life_drain.description: Drain life dealing [{base} + {attack} + {int}] magical damage and healing self for full damage dealt

bone_shield.name: Bone Shield
bone_shield.description: Conjure bones for protection granting {shieldAmount} shield

bone_arrow.name: Bone Arrow
bone_arrow.description: Fire a bone arrow dealing [{base} + {attack} + {agi}] physical damage and applying Bleed for {duration} turns

crippling_shot.name: Crippling Shot
crippling_shot.description: Crippling arrow dealing [{base} + {attack} + {agi}] physical damage and applying Reduce Speed for {duration} turns

death_bolt.name: Death Bolt
death_bolt.description: Hurl a bolt of death dealing [{base} + {attack} + {int}] magical damage

curse_of_weakness.name: Curse of Weakness
curse_of_weakness.description: Curse target applying Reduce Attack and Reduce Defense for {duration} turns

dark_empowerment.name: Dark Empowerment
dark_empowerment.description: Empower ally with dark magic granting Increase Attack for {duration} turns

life_tap.name: Life Tap
life_tap.description: Tap enemy life dealing [{base} + {attack} + {int}] magical damage and healing ally for {healPercent} of damage

necrotic_aura.name: Necrotic Aura
necrotic_aura.description: Surround self with necrotic energy gaining Frost Armor for {duration} turns

blood_frenzy.name: Blood Frenzy
blood_frenzy.description: Enter frenzy dealing [{base} + {attack} + {agi}] physical damage and gaining Increase Speed for {duration} turns

hypnotic_gaze.name: Hypnotic Gaze
hypnotic_gaze.description: Mesmerize target with vampiric gaze applying Stun for {duration} turn

crimson_shield.name: Crimson Shield
crimson_shield.description: Drain [{base} + {attack} + {agi}] life and create shield equal to damage dealt

meat_hook.name: Meat Hook
meat_hook.description: Hook enemy dealing [{base} + {attack} + {str}] physical damage and applying Taunt for {duration} turns

putrid_explosion.name: Putrid Explosion
putrid_explosion.description: Explode with putrid force dealing [{base} + {attack} + {str}] physical damage to all enemies and applying Blight for {duration} turns

stitched_armor.name: Stitched Armor
stitched_armor.description: Reinforce stitching gaining {shieldAmount} Shield and Increase Defense for {duration} turns

threatening_shout.name: Threatening Shout
threatening_shout.description: Shout threateningly applying Taunt to all enemies for {duration} turn

toughen_up.name: Toughen Up
toughen_up.description: Toughen muscles gaining Increase Defense for {duration} turns

flash_powder.name: Flash Powder
flash_powder.description: Throw flash powder dealing [{base} + {attack} + {int}] magical damage and applying Reduce Speed for {duration} turns

smoke_screen.name: Smoke Screen
smoke_screen.description: Create smoke screen applying Silence to all enemies for {duration} turns

shadow_strike.name: Shadow Strike
shadow_strike.description: Strike from shadows dealing [{base} + {attack} + {agi}] physical damage and applying Bleed for {duration} turns

hamstring.name: Hamstring
hamstring.description: Crippling strike dealing [{base} + {attack} + {agi}] physical damage, applying Reduce Speed and Reduce Attack for {duration} turns

marked_for_death.name: Marked for Death
marked_for_death.description: Mark target for death applying Mark and Reduce Defense for {duration} turns

inspiring_presence.name: Inspiring Presence
inspiring_presence.description: Inspire allies granting Increase Attack to all allies for {duration} turns

blade_flurry.name: Blade Flurry
blade_flurry.description: Unleash blade flurry hitting {hitCount} times for [{base} + {attack} + {str}] physical damage each

evasion.name: Evasion
evasion.description: Evade attacks gaining Immune for {duration} turn

lords_command.name: Lord's Command
lords_command.description: Command allies granting Increase Speed to all allies for {duration} turns

execution_order.name: Execution Order
execution_order.description: Execute enemy dealing [{base} + {attack} + {agi}] physical damage, stuns for {stunDuration} turn if below 50% HP

plunder.name: Plunder
plunder.description: Steal all buffs from target and distribute to allies

win.name: Win
win.description: [{base}] Pure Damage and gain Increase Speed for {duration} turns

increase_attack_test.name: Increase Attack Test
increase_attack_test.description: Grants Increase Attack buff for {duration} turns

increase_speed_test.name: Increase Speed Test
increase_speed_test.description: Grants Increase Speed buff for {duration} turns

increase_defense_test.name: Increase Defense Test
increase_defense_test.description: Grants Increase Defense buff for {duration} turns

shield_test.name: Shield Test
shield_test.description: Grants Shield buff that absorbs {shieldAmount} damage

frost_armor_test.name: Frost Armor Test
frost_armor_test.description: Grants Frost Armor buff for {duration} turns (25% damage reduction, attackers are slowed)

reduce_attack_test.name: Reduce Attack Test
reduce_attack_test.description: Inflicts Reduce Attack debuff for {duration} turns

reduce_speed_test.name: Reduce Speed Test
reduce_speed_test.description: Inflicts Reduce Speed debuff for {duration} turns

reduce_defense_test.name: Reduce Defense Test
reduce_defense_test.description: Inflicts Reduce Defense debuff for {duration} turns

taunt_test.name: Taunt Test
taunt_test.description: Forces enemy to attack this unit for {duration} turns
